tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Buildable Rust skeleton mirroring rmbujo (cargo, nix flake, rmapi overlay, Makefile, gitignore, base template, device.rs, theme.rs).

```json:metadata
{"files":["Cargo.toml","src/main.rs","src/lib.rs","flake.nix","nix/overlays/rmapi.nix","Makefile",".gitignore","templates/base.html","src/device.rs","src/theme.rs","tests/device.rs"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test device","acceptanceCriteria":["cargo build succeeds","device test passes","gitignore covers rmreader.toml"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Config structs that round-trip through TOML and a validate() that fails fast.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/config.rs","tests/config.rs"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test config","acceptanceCriteria":["TOML round-trip","validate rejects bad device/token/locations/backend/folders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Readwise client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fetch Library (new+later+shortlist merged) and Feed docs with html_content; paginate, dedupe, sort by saved_at desc, cap; testable HttpTransport seam; validate_token.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/readwise/mod.rs","src/readwise/http.rs","src/lib.rs","tests/readwise.rs"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test readwise","acceptanceCriteria":["pagination via nextPageCursor","429 honors Retry-After","merge+dedupe+sort+cap","validate_token 204"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wizard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** init wizard. Pure assemble(Answers)->Config+paths; run_wizard prompts + validates token.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/wizard.rs","src/lib.rs","tests/wizard.rs"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test wizard","acceptanceCriteria":["assemble builds valid config","config.validate ok","token validated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Content pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** html_content -> render-ready HTML: fetch images (guards), transcode WebP/AVIF->PNG, rewrite img src->key, strip script/iframe/on* via lol_html. ImageFetcher seam.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/content.rs","src/lib.rs","tests/content.rs"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test content","acceptanceCriteria":["strips script/iframe/handlers","embeds image + rewrites src","drops tracking pixel","images-disabled drops imgs without fetch"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: SPIKE — fulgur running-header links
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Decide per-page running-header nav vs per-section nav. Render multi-page HTML with <a> in GCPM running header; lopdf-count Link annotations on later pages; record decision.

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/spikes/2026-05-21-fulgur-running-header-links.md"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test spike_running_header -- --nocapture","acceptanceCriteria":["multi-page render","lopdf link-annotation count on later page","decision recorded; throwaway test removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Manifest + PDF assembly + templates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One HTML doc per PDF (index->cards->articles) with item-<id>/article-<id> anchors, nav (per spike), bookmark CSS; sidecar manifest. Built{fragments,assets,manifest}.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/manifest.rs","src/assemble.rs","templates/index.html","templates/card.html","templates/article.html","templates/nav.html","src/lib.rs","tests/assemble.rs"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test assemble","acceptanceCriteria":["cross-section anchors","Built.fragments Vec<String>","manifest lists each doc with anchors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Render (fulgur)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fulgur render of fragments+assets with Newsprint reader CSS, embedded Newsreader+Hanken Grotesk, color images, bookmarks(true). Prove internal links resolve via lopdf.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/render.rs","assets/fonts/Newsreader-Regular.ttf","assets/fonts/HankenGrotesk-Regular.ttf","src/lib.rs","tests/render.rs"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test render","acceptanceCriteria":["valid PDF","internal link annotation resolves","bookmarks present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Deploy (rmapi)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Upload both PDFs non-destructively. Copy rmbujo deploy (RmapiRunner, ProcessRmapi token-clobber guard, LocalDeployer); adapt to (PathBuf, folder) pairs.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/deploy/mod.rs","src/deploy/rmapi.rs","src/deploy/local.rs","src/lib.rs","tests/deploy.rs"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test --test deploy","acceptanceCriteria":["mkdir+put per target","refresh --content-only","two-folder sequence asserted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Generate orchestration + CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire fetch->content->assemble->render->manifest->deploy targets; UreqImageFetcher; CLI init + regenerate; full suite + clippy/fmt clean.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/generate.rs","src/cli.rs","src/lib.rs","tests/cli.rs","tests/generate.rs","Cargo.toml"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop -c cargo test","acceptanceCriteria":["generate writes pdf+manifest, returns targets","CLI init + regenerate flows","full suite + clippy + fmt clean"]}
```
